g.title: VariableDataFlow
g.text: Jumpa Verse - Major Variable Dependency and Data Flow Map

g.title: sdlhandles
g.text: Created by init(), consumed by all rendering/input helpers

g.title: player
g.text: character rect, gravity, jumpVelocity, onGround, fallOffest

g.title: ground
g.text: Generated platforms; moved by camera; rendered every frame

g.title: trap
g.text: Generated hazards; moved by camera; collision checked and rendered

g.title: menuvar
g.text: false => menu loop; true => gameplay loop

g.title: exitb
g.text: Global quit signal from menu/login/game-over/score screens

g.title: quit
g.text: Terminates outer loop and triggers cleanup

g.title: camdash
g.text: Additional camera offset added before cameraMovmentObj()

g.title: camoffset
g.text: Decrements over time; scroll amount for platforms/traps

g.title: username
g.text: Set after successful login; used when saving score

g.title: textures
g.text: Shared texture handles stored in ground_Class objects

g.title: font
g.text: Passed to menu, score, game-over, text screens

g.title: dt
g.text: Feeds camera, physics, score, menu preview animation

g.title: event
g.text: Branching input: quit, mouse, key, text, wheel
